name: greyhatcc
description: Grey hat penetration testing toolkit for Claude Code - recon, exploitation, reporting, CVE research, and bug bounty workflows

plugins.name: greyhatcc
plugins.description: Grey hat penetration testing toolkit for Claude Code with 27+ skills, 2 MCP servers (Shodan 17 tools, security-tools 14 tools), and hooks for credential guarding, scope validation, and finding tracking. Covers the full offensive security lifecycle: recon, exploitation, CORS/WAF/tech analysis, port scanning, subdomain enum, reporting, CVE research, OSINT, and bug bounty workflows.
